name: Black Forest Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the baking chocolate and mix it with 1 cup of sugar.
2. Beat eggs, sugar, and vanilla together until thick and fluffy.
3. Alternately fold in melted chocolate mixture and flour into the egg mixture, ending with flour.
4. Pour batter into greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10-15 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in center comes out clean.
6. Cool cakes on racks completely.
7. Make syrup by mixing sugar and water, boiling for 5 minutes, then stirring in kirsch.
8. Prick the cooled cake layers with a fork and pour over all three layers.
9. To make butter-cream filling, beat together sugar and butter until well blended.
10. Add egg yolk; beat until light and fluffy.
11. Fold in kirsch into the butter-cream mixture.
12. Assemble the cake by spreading butter-cream on one layer, scattering cherries over it, placing second layer on top, repeating with cherries, and adding third layer.
13. Fold 2 tablespoons of confectioners' sugar into whipped cream and spread around sides and top of the cake.
14. Decorate the top of the cake with remaining cherries.
15. Shave chocolate curls from cooled chocolate bar using a vegetable peeler and sprinkle on sides and top of the cake before serving.
